name: @chbrain/khai-engine-ritual
description: khai ritual engine — how collective action crosses a threshold and marks or transforms participants
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE and LICENSE-CODE

khai.tagline: How collective action crosses a threshold and marks or transforms participants.

card.wire: Link the phase the persona is running (separation, liminality, effervescence, or incorporation) under Projection.
card.issue: What the ritual is marking or transforming, and who participates.
card.require: A collective; a threshold being crossed; shared symbols or actions.
card.enforce: Track whether the ritual is generating collective effervescence. A ritual that fails to focus attention produces low emotional energy and weak solidarity.
card.setup: Name what is being separated from, what transformation is at stake, and who witnesses and receives the incorporation.
